performance_notes.note: Balance density vs hz for performance
Filters applied sequentially, each has cost

GlitchShift.ai_hint:

glitch_start, glitch_end: time window for glitching. seed: randomization seed.

Mirror.ai_hint:
Mirror/flip text horizontally or vertically.

Morph.ai_hint:
Character morphing/blending between text states.

direction: forward or reverse. seed: randomization seed.

Numeric.ai_hint:
Number transition animations for dashboards.

Smoothly animates between numeric values.

Odometer.ai_hint:
Odometer-style digit rolling animation.
Digits roll vertically like mechanical counter.
Retro/mechanical aesthetic for counters and scores.

Redact.ai_hint:
Redaction/censoring effect with █ blocks.
symbol: character used for redaction masking.
Covers text with blocks, can reveal progressively.

Scramble.ai_hint:
Random character scrambling that resolves to final text.
resolve_pace: how quickly characters settle. charset: character set to cycle.
seed: randomization seed for deterministic effects.

Combined scramble + glitch shift for maximum chaos.
resolve_pace: scramble settle rate. charset: scramble character set.
scramble_seed: scramble randomness. shift_amount: horizontal displacement.
glitch_start, glitch_end: glitch time window.

ScrambleGlitchShift.rustdoc_summary: Combined scramble and glitch shift effect

SlideShift.ai_hint:
Sliding text with row jump after passing a column span.
start_col, end_col: horizontal window. start_row: initial row.
shift_col, shift_width: barrier span. row_shift: rows to jump.
line_mode, flow_mode: line handling and flow direction.

parameters.doc: Ending column offset (in cells).

parameters.doc: Base row offset (in lines).

parameters.doc: Starting column of the shift barrier.
parameters.name: shift_col

parameters.doc: Width of the shift barrier in cells (≥ 1).
parameters.name: shift_width

parameters.doc: Row delta applied after crossing the barrier (negative = up).
parameters.name: row_shift

parameters.doc: How horizontal shift applies across multi-line text.
parameters.name: line_mode

parameters.doc: Whether to stay shifted or flow back after clearing the barrier.
parameters.name: flow_mode

SplitFlap.ai_hint:
Split-flap display effect like airport departure boards.
speed: flip speed. cascade: stagger between characters.
Characters flip through alphabet to reach target.

Typewriter.ai_hint:
Character-by-character text reveal.
speed_variance: jitter in per-character timing for organic typing.
Reveals text progressively based on t parameter.
Typewriter.name: Typewriter

WrapIndicator.ai_hint:
Prefix/suffix symbols appear progressively with progress.
Progress 0.0: "Item" → 0.5: "» Item" → 1.0: "» Item «"
prefix/suffix strings, characters appear one at a time. Ideal for hover indicators.

parameters.doc: Right bracket character

parameters.doc: Progress (0.0 = invisible, 1.0 = fully visible)

BracketEmphasis.rustdoc_summary: Brackets that appear around content based on progress

BrailleDust.ai_hint:
Animated braille particles for ambient texture.
density: particle coverage (0.05=sparse, 0.2=dense).
hz: animation speed/update rate.
seed: randomization seed. color: particle color.
pattern: SingleDot (subtle), OneToTwoDots, OneToThreeDots, OneToFourDots (visible).
Requires braille font support.

parameters.doc: Random seed for deterministic patterns
parameters.name: seed

BrailleDust.rustdoc_description: Stochastic braille dust for frosted glass texture
BrailleDust.rustdoc_summary: Stochastic braille dust for frosted glass texture

ColorBridgedShade.ai_hint:
Maps opacity to shade characters (░▒▓█) with color bridging.
fg_color, bg_color: endpoint colors for shading transitions.
Smooth color transitions at shade boundaries.
ColorBridgedShade.name: ColorBridgedShade

ColorBridgedShade.rustdoc_summary: Color-bridged shade for smooth opacity rendering

Crt.ai_hint:
CRT monitor post-processing effect.
scanline_strength: intensity of horizontal scanlines (0.2-0.4 typical).
glow: phosphor glow amount around bright pixels.
Pairs well with Crt sampler for full retro effect.

parameters.doc: Strength of scanline effect, can be signal-driven
parameters.name: scanline_strength

parameters.doc: Phosphor glow amount, can be signal-driven
parameters.name: glow

Dim.ai_hint:
Darken output uniformly.
factor: 0.0=black, 1.0=unchanged (0.5 typical for dimming).

Dim.name: Dim

parameters.name: factor

parameters.name: apply_to

DotIndicator.ai_hint:
Dot/bullet fades in adjacent to content.
progress: 0.0-1.0 fade amount. indicator_char default •, position Left/Right.
For list selection and navigation.
DotIndicator.name: DotIndicator

parameters.name: indicator_char

parameters.doc: Progress (0.0 = invisible, 1.0 = fully visible)

DotIndicator.rustdoc_description: Simple dot/bullet indicator adjacent to content
DotIndicator.rustdoc_summary: Simple dot/bullet indicator adjacent to content

GlistenSweep.ai_hint:
Diagonal 45-degree highlight sweep for polished hover feedback.
boost: brightness increase (default 40, 0-255).
band_width: glisten width as fraction of diagonal (0.2 typical).
speed: animation rate (0.5 default, 0=manual progress only).
progress: 0.0=inactive, 1.0=fully visible.
powerline_mode: true to handle powerline separators safely (bg on text, fg on separators).
boost_separator_bg: true to also boost separator backgrounds for continuous powerlines.
Creates premium "shine" effect for buttons and cards on hover.
GlistenSweep.name: GlistenSweep

parameters.doc: Highlight color boost (added to existing colors)
parameters.name: boost

parameters.doc: Width of the glisten band (0.0-1.0, relative to diagonal)
parameters.name: band_width

parameters.doc: Animation speed (0 = use progress only)
parameters.name: speed

parameters.doc: Hover progress (0.0 = not hovered, 1.0 = fully hovered)
parameters.name: progress

parameters.doc: Smart powerline mode: bg on text, fg only on separator glyphs
parameters.name: powerline_mode

parameters.doc:
When true AND powerline_mode is true, also boost separator backgrounds.
Use when powerline has continuous background (not terminal bg).
parameters.name: boost_separator_bg

Greyscale.ai_hint:
Desaturate output using BT.601 luminance formula.
strength: desaturation amount (0.0=color, 1.0=full greyscale).
apply_to: Foreground, Background, or Both.
Ideal for disabled/inactive states.
Greyscale.name: Greyscale

parameters.doc: Strength of the greyscale effect (0.0 = no effect, 1.0 = full greyscale)
parameters.name: strength

parameters.doc: Which color component to desaturate
parameters.name: apply_to

HoverBar.ai_hint:
Progress-driven partial bar using ▏▎▍▌▋▊▉█ with fg/bg inversion.
base_eighths: width at rest (0-8), max_eighths: width at full (0-16, spans 2 cells).
position: Left/Right, margin_width default 2. Ideal for list selection.
HoverBar.name: HoverBar

parameters.doc: Base width at rest (0.0 progress), in eighths (0-8)
parameters.name: base_eighths

parameters.doc: Maximum width when fully active (1.0 progress), in eighths (0-16)
parameters.name: max_eighths

parameters.doc: Position relative to content
parameters.name: position

parameters.doc: Animation progress (0.0 = rest, 1.0 = fully active)
parameters.name: progress

HoverBar.rustdoc_description: Progress-driven partial bar indicator for hover states
HoverBar.rustdoc_summary: Progress-driven partial bar indicator for hover states

InterlaceCurtain.ai_hint:
Scanline/interlace dimming effect.
density: row spacing (1.0=every other row). dim_factor: per-row darkening amount.
scroll_speed: animates the scanlines.
InterlaceCurtain.name: InterlaceCurtain

parameters.doc: Controls row spacing (1.0 = every other row, 0.5 = every 4th row)
parameters.name: density

parameters.doc: Dimming factor applied to affected rows (0.0 = no dimming, 1.0 = black)
parameters.name: dim_factor

parameters.doc: Scroll speed for animation (0.0 = static)
parameters.name: scroll_speed

Invert.ai_hint:
Color inversion (negative) effect.
apply_to: Foreground, Background, or Both.
Creates high-contrast selection or dramatic effect.
Invert.name: Invert

parameters.doc: Which color component to invert
parameters.name: apply_to

KittScanner.ai_hint:
Horizontal ping-pong scanner (KITT/Larson scanner) effect.
boost: brightness increase (default 50).
band_width: scanner column width (0.15 default, 0.0-0.5).
bps: beats per second for ping-pong cycle (1.0 = 2 second full cycle).
progress: 0.0=inactive, 1.0=fully active.
apply_to: which channel to boost (fg, bg, or both) when not in powerline mode.
powerline_mode: true to handle powerline separators safely.
boost_separator_bg: true to also boost separator backgrounds for continuous powerlines.
Full-height scanning column with smooth ping-pong motion.
Classic Knight Rider aesthetic for retro sci-fi hover states.
KittScanner.name: KittScanner

parameters.doc: Brightness boost added to cells under the scanner
parameters.name: boost

parameters.doc: Width of the scanner band (0.0-0.5 of total width)
parameters.name: band_width

parameters.doc: Beats per second for ping-pong cycle
parameters.name: bps

parameters.doc: Animation progress (0.0 = inactive, 1.0 = fully active)
parameters.name: progress

parameters.doc: Which color component to boost (ignored if powerline_mode is true)
parameters.name: apply_to

parameters.doc: Smart powerline mode: bg on text, fg only on separator glyphs
parameters.name: powerline_mode

parameters.doc:
When true AND powerline_mode is true, also boost separator backgrounds.
Use when powerline has continuous background (not terminal bg).
parameters.name: boost_separator_bg

MotionBlur.ai_hint:
Directional blur trail.
direction: Left/Right/Up/Down. trail_length: number of trailing cells.
opacity_decay: controls falloff sharpness.
MotionBlur.name: MotionBlur

parameters.name: direction

MotionBlur.rustdoc_summary: Motion blur trail effect with directional dimming

None.ai_hint: No filter effect, passthrough output. Use to disable filtering.
None.name: None

PatternFill.ai_hint:
Background texture patterns.
pattern: Single (char), Checkerboard (char_a, char_b), HorizontalLines, VerticalLines.
color: pattern color. only_empty: only fill empty cells.
See PatternType variants for full options.
PatternFill.name: PatternFill

PatternFill.rustdoc_summary: Pattern fill effect for background textures

PillButton.ai_hint:
Pill-shaped button with gradient edges and optional glisten.
button_color: main button fill color.
bg_color: background for gradient fade at edges.
edge_width: cells for gradient transition (default 3).
glisten: enable shimmer effect on hover (default true).
progress: hover state (0.0=rest, 1.0=fully hovered).
Creates no-border button with smooth bg→button→bg gradient.
Brightens on hover, adds moving glisten when progress>0.5.
PillButton.name: PillButton

parameters.doc: Enable glisten effect on hover
parameters.name: glisten

parameters.name: progress

RigidShake.ai_hint:
Ketchup bottle damped oscillation. Multiple diminishing shakes then pause.
IMPORTANT: Apply to area INCLUDING margin cells (margin_width default 2).
Key params: shake_period=0.29s, num_shakes=4, pause_duration=0.52s, max_eighths=12 (1.5 cells).
damping array controls amplitude decay (e.g., [1.0, 0.7, 0.45, 0.25]).
Pairs with RigidShakeStyle for synchronized text italic.
RigidShake.name: RigidShake

parameters.doc: Duration of one back-and-forth shake in seconds
parameters.name: shake_period

parameters.doc: Number of shakes before pause (max 8)
parameters.name: num_shakes

parameters.doc: Duration of pause between shake cycles in seconds
parameters.name: pause_duration

parameters.doc: Maximum extension in eighths of a cell (max 16 for 2 cells)
parameters.name: max_eighths

RigidShake.rustdoc_description: Rigid body shake filter with damped oscillation
RigidShake.rustdoc_summary: Rigid body shake filter with damped oscillation

ShadeScanner.ai_hint:
Ping-pong scanner that dims text with shade overlay (░).
shade_color: overlay color (default rgb(40,40,45)).
bps: beats per second for ping-pong cycle.
progress: 0.0=inactive, 1.0=fully active.
Text left of scanner position gets progressively dimmed.
Creates wave of dimming that washes over and retreats.
Retro terminal aesthetic with dramatic reveal/dim effect.
ShadeScanner.name: ShadeScanner

parameters.doc: Shade color (the dimming overlay color)
parameters.name: shade_color

parameters.doc: Beats per second for ping-pong cycle
parameters.name: bps

parameters.doc: Animation progress (0.0 = inactive, 1.0 = fully active)
parameters.name: progress

ShadeScanner.rustdoc_description: Ping-pong scanner that dims text with shade overlay
ShadeScanner.rustdoc_summary: Ping-pong scanner that dims text with shade overlay

SubCellShake.ai_hint:
Physical edge vibration using ▏▎▍▌▋▊▉ partial blocks.
Simulates tactile feedback like incorrect password shake.
amplitude: shake intensity. frequency: oscillation rate.
seed: randomization. edge_only: true limits to widget borders.
filled_color, bg_color: vibration colors.
Best for error/rejection feedback, button press responses.

parameters.doc: Shake frequency (cycles per second)

parameters.name: seed

parameters.doc: If true, only shake edge cells (left and right borders)
parameters.name: edge_only

SubCellShake.rustdoc_description: Sub-cell shake using partial vertical blocks
SubCellShake.rustdoc_summary: Sub-cell shake using partial vertical blocks

SubPixelBar.ai_hint:
High-resolution progress bar with 8x cell precision.
Uses ▏▎▍▌▋▊▉█ (horizontal) or ▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█ (vertical) partial blocks.

direction: Horizontal or Vertical.

Vignette.ai_hint:
Edge darkening that draws focus to center.

Blinds.ai_hint:
Venetian blinds effect for professional presentations.
orientation: Horizontal or Vertical slats.
count: number of blind slats.

Orientation of the blinds.

- `Horizontal`: Slats run left-right, open top-to-bottom
- `Vertical`: Slats run top-bottom, open left-to-right

Number of blind slats.

Classic film-style linear reveal/hide.

Wipe.rustdoc_summary: Linear wipe reveal/hide from one edge to another

CRT monitor scanlines and barrel curvature distortion.

Fault line displacement like tectonic shift.

intensity: displacement amount.
split_bias: tendency to split horizontally vs vertically.

Circular ripple emanating from center point.

Center point of the ripple.

Shredder.ai_hint:

SineWave.ai_hint:
Sinusoidal wave distortion for underwater/dream effects.

parameters.name: phase

Contact shadow darkening cells near widget edges.

Vertical gradient highlighting selected row.

falloff_distance: gradient fade distance from selected row.

StochasticSparkle.ai_hint:
Film grain / frosted glass shimmer for premium surfaces.
sparkle_density: fraction of cells (0.05=5%), brightness_boost: multiplier (1.2=20% brighter).
speed: 0.25=shimmer, 1.0=static. noise_type: Uniform (even) or Gaussian (clustered).
apply_to: Foreground/Background/Both.
StochasticSparkle.name: StochasticSparkle

parameters.doc:
Fraction of cells that sparkle per frame (0.0 - 1.0).
0.05 = 5% of cells sparkle, creating subtle texture.
Higher values create more active/noisy appearance.
parameters.name: sparkle_density

parameters.doc:
How much to brighten sparkling cells (multiplier).
1.0 = no change, 1.2 = 20% brighter, 1.5 = 50% brighter.
parameters.name: brightness_boost

parameters.doc:
Speed of sparkle animation (lower = slower shimmer).
1.0 = update every frame, 0.25 = update every 4 frames.
Lower values create "shimmering sand" vs "static" look.
parameters.name: speed

parameters.doc: Which color channel(s) to apply sparkle to.
parameters.name: apply_to

StochasticSparkle.rustdoc_description: Film grain / frosted glass effect with random cell brightening
StochasticSparkle.rustdoc_summary: Film grain / frosted glass effect with random cell brightening

RigidShakeStyle.ai_hint:
Italic style synchronized with RigidShake filter timing.
shake_period, num_shakes, pause_duration: must match RigidShake params.
Applies italic when widget shifts right, creating coordinated motion.
ALWAYS use with RigidShake filter for proper synchronization.

Spatial.ai_hint:
Wraps any SpatialShaderType as a style effect.

Advanced composition for custom animations.

layers.filter: Post-processing on rendered output. Applied last.
layers.sampler: Distorts coordinates before rendering. Applied first.
layers.shader: Per-cell styling based on position/time. Visual texture.

error_shake.notes: Ensure widget has 2-cell margins on each side
